title: KC3-H627G-P-200727V307-200925V311_20201009164906
description:
Caution! This update may crash rooted devices.
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.

1.Updated Google Security Patch to Oct.5, 2020.
Reminding:
1. Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2. Visit the TECNO spot forum (http://bbs.tecno-mobile.com) for more information.
